deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f /run/secrets/relay_token ]; then exec c2c relay serve --listen 0.0.0.0:${PORT} --token-file /run/secrets/relay_token; elif [ -n "${RELAY_TOKEN:-}" ]; then exec c2c relay serve --listen 0.0.0.0:${PORT} --token "${RELAY_TOKEN}"; else exec c2c relay serve --listen 0.0.0.0:${PORT}; fi'
